mission.title: thanos: sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus
mission.description: sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current thanos deployment
steps.description:
Verify your thanos version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
helm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working thanos installation.

steps.title: Review thanos configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos
```
Since Prometheus version 2.24, we can configure basic authentication and TLS for Prometheus, in my case, the Prometheus provide service directly to the whole internal network, so we enable login credential and TLS (we don't want everyone access

steps.title: Apply the fix for sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus
steps.description:
Added new flag `prometheus.http-client` to sidecar to pass http client config via file or string(similar to [alertmanager](https://thanos.io/tip/components/rule.md/#configuration)). Using this flag an instance of `thanoshttp.Client` is created and is passed to `promclient.NewClient`  method which uses this client as base client instead of whole new client which then makes authori

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Added new flag `prometheus.http-client` to sidecar to pass http client config via file or string(similar to [alertmanager](https://thanos.io/tip/components/rule.md/#configuration)). Using this flag an instance of `thanoshttp.Client` is created and is passed to `promclient.NewClient`  method which uses this client as base client instead of whole new client which then makes authori

See the source issue and linked PR for the complete solution details.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with Thanos deployed (sidecar, query, store gateway, compactor as needed). The thanos binary provides subcommands for each component.
